summary: Phase 4-6 Tournament Lifecycle testing. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (92%). Created comprehensive lifecycle test covering: tournament creation, registration of 8 users, tournament start (groups+matchups generation), round creation/opening, round completion, knockout bracket generation. Frontend: Login works, home page with TORNEI section loads. Tournament detail page has issues loading on direct navigation (auth context loss).

minor.issue: Returns 404 'Round non trovato' when matchup exists but no round with matching round_number and round_type exists. Edge case when matchups are created during tournament start but rounds haven't been created yet.

integration_issues.issue: Page gets stuck on loading spinner when navigating directly to tournament detail URL. Auth context may be lost on page reload. Works when navigating through the app flow.

action_items: MINOR: Fix GET /api/tournaments/{id}/matchup/{matchupId}/live endpoint to handle case where matchup exists but no round with matching round_number/round_type exists yet. Consider returning empty matches array or more informative error.
INVESTIGATE: Frontend session/auth persistence on direct URL navigation to /tournament/{id}. Page gets stuck on loading spinner.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend tournament lifecycle is well implemented with proper status transitions (draft -> registration -> groups -> knockout)
my-matchups endpoint correctly returns user's matchups sorted by round_number
Round completion correctly calculates scores using calculate_match_points
generate-knockout correctly determines group standings and creates knockout matchups
Frontend tournament detail [id].tsx has all 4 tabs (Info, Le mie sfide, Gironi, Tabellone) implemented with proper conditional rendering
Frontend matchup.tsx has live score banner and matches comparison UI
Missing: data-testid on hamburger menu for easier UI testing

success_rate.frontend: 70% - Login and home page work, tournament detail navigation has issues

test_credentials.test_users: Created 7 test users with prefix 'tb901' during lifecycle test

seed_data_creation: Created tournament 'TEST_LC_tb901' in knockout status with 8 participants, 2 groups, 1 completed round, knockout matchups generated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4-6 Tournament lifecycle backend is working. A test tournament 'TEST_LC_tb901' exists in knockout phase with matchups. The live matchup endpoint has an edge case bug when rounds don't exist for matchup's round_number. Frontend direct URL navigation to /tournament/{id} may have auth persistence issues - recommend testing via app navigation flow instead.

tested_flows.backend_matchup_live: FAIL - 404 when no round exists for matchup's round_number
